title: Morrozan Couscous
description: An earthy and gooey Moroccan dish that's perfect for a weeknight meal featuring salt, knead, and low-sodium-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: 3 bell peppers, any color, thinly sliced
1 can (15 oz) chickpeas, drained and rinsed

instructions: Mix couscous with water or broth in a bowl. Let it sit for about 5 minutes until the liquid is absorbed.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add onions and garlic; sauté for 2-3 minutes until softened.
Stir in cumin and coriander. Cook for an additional minute, stirring frequently.
Add salt to taste. Mix the couscous mixture with the onion-cumin-garlic mixture and set aside.
Combine the couscous mixture with sliced peppers and chickpeas in a large mixing bowl. Toss gently to combine.
Transfer the couscous mixture into a 2-quart baking dish. Spread evenly.
Bake for about 10 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Serve hot as a side dish or over rice or quinoa.
